title: auth-profiles.json bind-mount → included in docker run options
evidence: All 3 TC-011 tests passed in 6ms (322/322 total tests). readOnlyBindMounts includes `{homedir}/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json:/root/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json`; simulated docker arg ends with `:ro`; env contains HOME=/home/agent, XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/home/agent/.config, XDG_CACHE_HOME=/home/agent/.cache, XDG_STATE_HOME=/home/agent/.local/state; cpus="1.0", memory="1536m", pidsLimit=256.
